metadata_information.title: Water nationalization and service quality
metadata_information.version: Python script, from D&R API, generated on 2026-03-19

document_description.abstract: The objective of this paper is to explore the impact of Uruguay's privatization and subsequent nationalization of water services on network access and water quality. The results suggest that although the early privatization of water services had little impact on access to the sanitation network, the subsequent nationalization led to an increase in network access at the bottom of the income distribution as well as an improvement in water quality.
document_description.usage_terms: See World Bank Access to Information (https://www.worldbank.org/en/access-to-information)

An objective of the series is to get the findings out quickly, even if the presentations are less than fully polished. The papers carry the names of the authors and should be cited accordingly.
